D:\STM32CubeCLT\STM32CubeCLT_1.18.0\CMake\bin\cmake.exe -E rm -f CMakeFiles\hello_app.dir/objects.a
D:\MinGW\i686-15.2.0-release-mcf-dwarf-ucrt-rt_v13-rev1\mingw32\bin\ar.exe qc CMakeFiles\hello_app.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\hello_app.dir\objects1.rsp
D:\MinGW\i686-15.2.0-release-mcf-dwarf-ucrt-rt_v13-rev1\mingw32\bin\cc.exe -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\hello_app.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -o hello_app.exe -Wl,--out-implib,libhello_app.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\hello_app.dir\linkLibs.rsp
